scenario.name: reverse-mode AD polynomial
scenario.profile_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-profile-baseline cargo bench -p fj-ad --bench ad_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

hypothesis_ledger.hypothesis: reverse-mode backward allocates a Vec<Value> for every tape entry's output cotangents even when the primitive has one output
hypothesis_ledger.evidence: top profiled rows are reverse-mode polynomial paths; code inspection of backward() showed per-entry Vec collection before every vjp() call

hypothesis_ledger.hypothesis: JVP path is the optimization target
hypothesis_ledger.evidence: top reverse-mode rows were slower than JVP rows in the initial fj-ad Criterion profile

optimization.lever: special-case single-output tape entries in backward() and pass std::slice::from_ref(&g) to vjp(), preserving the existing Vec<Value> path for multi-output equations

paired_benchmark.baseline_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-xzuo-baseline-warm cargo bench -p fj-ad --bench ad_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1
paired_benchmark.after_command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-xzuo-after cargo bench -p fj-ad --bench ad_baseline -- --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: yes; tape traversal remains reverse iteration over tape.entries and input cotangents are accumulated in the same entry.inputs order
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes; no sorting, selection, or winner policy changed
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: identical for the profiled single-output path; vjp() receives the same one cotangent Value and value_add accumulation order is unchanged
isomorphism_proof.rng: unchanged; fj-ad backward path has no RNG surface
isomorphism_proof.multi_output_preserved: yes; non-single-output equations still build the Vec<Value> of output cotangents and call vjp() exactly as before

validation.focused_test: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-xzuo-test cargo test -p fj-ad grad_profiled_polynomial_single_output_path_matches_expected -- --nocapture
validation.crate_check: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-xzuo-check cargo check -p fj-ad --all-targets
validation.crate_tests: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-xzuo-test-all cargo test -p fj-ad --all-targets
validation.crate_tests_result: passed on vmi1149989: 324 unit tests passed plus ad_baseline bench smoke rows
validation.crate_clippy: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-ad-xzuo-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-ad --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
validation.ubs_result: nonzero from existing fj-ad monolith inventory: 21 critical panic surfaces, 4531 warnings, 829 info; no new fast-path-specific finding
validation.format_check: cargo fmt -p fj-ad --check currently fails on pre-existing dirty fj-ad Slogdet/LU hunks outside this perf lever; those lines were not formatted or staged by this bead
